positive: A minimalist geometric celestial scene featuring stylized constellations, deep indigo space, and glowing gold line art representing mythical beasts and stars. The composition is perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, suitable for repeating patterns. Include abstract elements like crescent moons, stylized comets, and interconnected star pathways. The style should be modern, elegant, and pop-art influenced, with strong contrast between the rich, velvety dark background and the luminous golden lines. Flat graphic design principles, crisp lines, zero gradients in the background, ultra-high detail, clean vector art quality, symmetrical, perfect silhouette, centered composition, 300 DPI, high contrast, suitable for apparel print.
